```python
def knapsack_01(weights, values, capacity):
    """
    Returns the maximum total value that can be obtained by selecting a subset
    of items (each used at most once) without exceeding the given capacity.
    """
    n = len(weights)
    # dp[cap] = max value achievable with exactly 'cap' capacity used (up to cap)
    dp = [0] * (capacity + 1)
    
    for i in range(n):
        w = weights[i]
        v = values[i]
        # iterate backwards to avoid reusing the same item
        for cap in range(capacity, w - 1, -1):
            dp[cap] = max(dp[cap], dp[cap - w] + v)
    
    return dp[capacity]
```
